verses.latin_vulgate: Consurge, consurge, induere fortitudine tua, Sion !  induere vestimentis gloriæ tuæ,  Jerusalem, civitas Sancti,  quia non adjiciet ultra ut pertranseat per te  incircumcisus et immundus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עוּרִ֥י עוּרִ֛י לִבְשִׁ֥י עֻזֵּ֖ךְ צִיּ֑וֹן לִבְשִׁ֣י ׀ בִּגְדֵ֣י תִפְאַרְתֵּ֗ךְ יְרוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ עִ֣יר הַקֹּ֔דֶשׁ כִּ֣י לֹ֥א יוֹסִ֛יף יָבֹא־בָ֥ךְ ע֖וֹד עָרֵ֥ל וְטָמֵֽא׃
verses.king_james: Awake, awake; put on thy strength, O Zion; put on thy beautiful garments, O Jerusalem, the holy city: for henceforth there shall no more come into thee the uncircumcised and the unclean.

verses.latin_vulgate: Excutere de pulvere, consurge ;  sede, Jerusalem !  solve vincula colli tui,  captiva filia Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִתְנַעֲרִ֧י מֵעָפָ֛ר ק֥וּמִי שְּׁבִ֖י יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם (התפתחו) [הִֽתְפַּתְּחִי֙] מוֹסְרֵ֣י צַוָּארֵ֔ךְ שְׁבִיָּ֖ה בַּת־צִיּֽוֹן׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Shake thyself from the dust; arise, and sit down, O Jerusalem: loose thyself from the bands of thy neck, O captive daughter of Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus :  Gratis venundati estis,  et sine argento redimemini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־כֹה֙ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה חִנָּ֖ם נִמְכַּרְתֶּ֑ם וְלֹ֥א בְכֶ֖סֶף תִּגָּאֵֽלוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord, Ye have sold yourselves for nought; and ye shall be redeemed without money.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  In Ægyptum descendit populus meus in principio, ut colonus esset ibi,  et Assur absque ulla causa calumniatus est eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כֹ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה מִצְרַ֛יִם יָֽרַד־עַמִּ֥י בָרִֽאשֹׁנָ֖ה לָג֣וּר שָׁ֑ם וְאַשּׁ֖וּר בְּאֶ֥פֶס עֲשָׁקֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord God, My people went down aforetime into Egypt to sojourn there; and the Assyrian oppressed them without cause.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc quid mihi est hic, dicit Dominus,  quoniam ablatus est populus meus gratis ?  Dominatores ejus inique agunt, dicit Dominus,  et jugiter tota die nomen meum blasphematur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֤ה מַה־לִּי־פֹה֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּֽי־לֻקַּ֥ח עַמִּ֖י חִנָּ֑ם מֹשְׁלָ֤ו יְהֵילִ֙ילוּ֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְתָמִ֥יד כׇּל־הַיּ֖וֹם שְׁמִ֥י מִנֹּאָֽץ׃
verses.king_james: Now therefore, what have I here, saith the Lord, that my people is taken away for nought? they that rule over them make them to howl, saith the Lord; and my name continually every day is blasphemed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc sciet populus meus nomen meum  in die illa :  quia ego ipse qui loquebar, ecce adsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֛ן יֵדַ֥ע עַמִּ֖י שְׁמִ֑י לָכֵן֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא כִּֽי־אֲנִי־ה֥וּא הַֽמְדַבֵּ֖ר הִנֵּֽנִי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Therefore my people shall know my name: therefore they shall know in that day that I am he that doth speak: behold, it is I.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam pulchri super montes pedes annuntiantis  et prædicantis pacem ;  annuntiantis bonum,  prædicantis salutem,  dicentis Sion :  Regnabit Deus tuus !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־נָּאו֨וּ עַל־הֶהָרִ֜ים רַגְלֵ֣י מְבַשֵּׂ֗ר מַשְׁמִ֧יעַ שָׁל֛וֹם מְבַשֵּׂ֥ר ט֖וֹב מַשְׁמִ֣יעַ יְשׁוּעָ֑ה אֹמֵ֥ר לְצִיּ֖וֹן מָלַ֥ךְ אֱלֹהָֽיִךְ׃
verses.king_james: How beautiful upon the mountains are the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace; that bringeth good tidings of good, that publisheth salvation; that saith unto Zion, Thy God reigneth!

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox speculatorum tuorum : levaverunt vocem,  simul laudabunt,  quia oculo ad oculum videbunt  cum converterit Dominus Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֥וֹל צֹפַ֛יִךְ נָ֥שְׂאוּ ק֖וֹל יַחְדָּ֣ו יְרַנֵּ֑נוּ כִּ֣י עַ֤יִן בְּעַ֙יִן֙ יִרְא֔וּ בְּשׁ֥וּב יְהֹוָ֖ה צִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Thy watchmen shall lift up the voice; with the voice together shall they sing: for they shall see eye to eye, when the Lord shall bring again Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gaudete, et laudate simul,  deserta Jerusalem,  quia consolatus est Dominus populum suum ;  redemit Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּצְח֤וּ רַנְּנוּ֙ יַחְדָּ֔ו חׇרְב֖וֹת יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם כִּֽי־נִחַ֤ם יְהֹוָה֙ עַמּ֔וֹ גָּאַ֖ל יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: Break forth into joy, sing together, ye waste places of Jerusalem: for the Lord hath comforted his people, he hath redeemed Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Paravit Dominus brachium sanctum suum  in oculis omnium gentium ;  et videbunt omnes fines terræ  salutare Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָשַׂ֤ף יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־זְר֣וֹעַ קׇדְשׁ֔וֹ לְעֵינֵ֖י כׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֑ם וְרָאוּ֙ כׇּל־אַפְסֵי־אָ֔רֶץ אֵ֖ת יְשׁוּעַ֥ת אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The Lord hath made bare his holy arm in the eyes of all the nations; and all the ends of the earth shall see the salvation of our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recedite, recedite ; exite inde,  pollutum nolite tangere ;  exite de medio ejus ; mundamini,  qui fertis vasa Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ס֤וּרוּ ס֙וּרוּ֙ צְא֣וּ מִשָּׁ֔ם טָמֵ֖א אַל־תִּגָּ֑עוּ צְא֣וּ מִתּוֹכָ֔הּ הִבָּ֕רוּ נֹשְׂאֵ֖י כְּלֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Depart ye, depart ye, go ye out from thence, touch no unclean thing; go ye out of the midst of her; be ye clean, that bear the vessels of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam non in tumultu exibitis,  nec in fuga properabitis ;  præcedet enim vos Dominus,  et congregabit vos Deus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לֹ֤א בְחִפָּזוֹן֙ תֵּצֵ֔אוּ וּבִמְנוּסָ֖ה לֹ֣א תֵלֵכ֑וּן כִּֽי־הֹלֵ֤ךְ לִפְנֵיכֶם֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה וּמְאַסִּפְכֶ֖ם אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For ye shall not go out with haste, nor go by flight: for the Lord will go before you; and the God of Israel will be your rereward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce intelliget servus meus,  exaltabitur et elevabitur, et sublimis erit valde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֥ה יַשְׂכִּ֖יל עַבְדִּ֑י יָר֧וּם וְנִשָּׂ֛א וְגָבַ֖הּ מְאֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: Behold, my servant shall deal prudently, he shall be exalted and extolled, and be very high.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut obstupuerunt super te multi,  sic inglorius erit inter viros aspectus ejus,  et forma ejus inter filios hominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר שָׁמְמ֤וּ עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ רַבִּ֔ים כֵּן־מִשְׁחַ֥ת מֵאִ֖ישׁ מַרְאֵ֑הוּ וְתֹאֲר֖וֹ מִבְּנֵ֥י אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: As many were astonied at thee; his visage was so marred more than any man, and his form more than the sons of men:

verses.latin_vulgate: Iste asperget gentes multas ;  super ipsum continebunt reges os suum :  quia quibus non est narratum de eo viderunt,  et qui non audierunt contemplati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֵּ֤ן יַזֶּה֙ גּוֹיִ֣ם רַבִּ֔ים עָלָ֛יו יִקְפְּצ֥וּ מְלָכִ֖ים פִּיהֶ֑ם כִּ֠י אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹֽא־סֻפַּ֤ר לָהֶם֙ רָא֔וּ וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־שָׁמְע֖וּ הִתְבּוֹנָֽנוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: So shall he sprinkle many nations; the kings shall shut their mouths at him: for that which had not been told them shall they see; and that which they had not heard shall they consider.
